sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 9:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 9:1
items.html: The AHP that emerged from the first Rosh and were considered, in relation to it, as the phase of Guf and receiving from it, are the second phase of Nekudim. Also, they are the GAR of Nekudim. (Inner Light, Item 20)
